title: Flaky Pan-Seared Fish
description: A simple and delicious recipe for pan-seared fish with a crispy flaky crust. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Fry mix (for breading)
ingredients.notes: Omit or substitute for gluten-free option

instructions: Rinse the fish fillet and pat dry with paper towels.
In a shallow dish, mix together the fry mix and a pinch of salt.
Dip the fish fillet in the olive oil, then coat in the fry mix mixture.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add a small amount of olive oil to the pan.
Add the coated fish fillet to the pan and sear for 3-4 minutes on each side.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve hot with a dollop of sour cream and a sprinkle of fry mix (if using).
